agent_response_text:
I'm on it! I will look for an HTC cell phone with 2GB RAM and over 16GB of storage.
I couldn't find any HTC cell phones with those exact specifications. Let me try a broader search for HTC cell phones.I couldn't find any HTC cell phones that match your specifications for RAM and storage. However, I did find some accessories for HTC cell phones. The top result is an HTC case for HTC A11 Cell Phones in black, which features soft, durable TPU material to guard against accidental drops and bumps.

products_hits.name: HTC - Case for HTC A11 Cell Phones - Black
products_hits.description: Protect your phone from damage with this HTC NS-HTCAT2B case for HTC A11 cell phones, which features soft, durable TPU material to guard against accidental drops and bumps. The play-through design offers access to your phone's keys and open ports.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Cell Phone Cases & Clips

products_hits.name: Platinum Series - Kickstand Case for HTC One Cell Phones - Black
products_hits.description: This Platinum Series PT-HOC53SG case features a built-in kickstand to allow easy viewing of your HTC One cell phone in landscape orientation. The felt-lined holster and belt clip ensure simple portability, while offering protection on the go.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Cell Phone Cases & Clips

products_hits.name: Insignia™ - Hard Shell Soft-Touch Case for HTC One Cell Phones - Blue
products_hits.description: Only at Best Buy  This Insignia™ NS-MH1H2L hard shell soft-touch case features rugged polycarbonate material to shield your HTC One cell phone from damage caused by impacts. The play-through design retains your ability to use your phone's buttons and ports.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Cell Phone Cases & Clips

products_hits.name: HTC - Case for HTC One (M8) Cell Phones - Translucent
products_hits.description: Shield your HTC One (M8) cell phone from scratches and scuffs with this HTC 63-2841-05-BB case that features a hard shell design for durable defense. A screen protector is included for additional peace of mind.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Cell Phone Cases & Clips

products_hits.name: HTC - Flip Case for HTC One (M8) Cell Phones - Imperial Blue
products_hits.description: Safeguard your HTC One (M8) cell phone against scratches and other minor damage with this HTC 34-2638-05-BB case that is constructed from durable material for reliable defense. The front flip cover protects your phone's display.

hierarchicalCategories.lvl2: Cell Phones > Cell Phone Accessories > Cell Phone Cases & Clips
